name: Stickman 3D Wingsuit
description: Free 3D stickman wingsuit skydiving simulator You are a stickman wingsuit pilot! Fly through beautiful 3D levels and avoid deadly lava, spikes and saw blades. Remember to open up your parachute! Skydiving as a stick man has never been so bloody and deadly! note: the game uses the gyro for the best wingsuit flying experience If you like skydiving and base jumping this game is for you! Become a real stickman! sounds: freesound.org
instructions: arrows - move space - parachute x - grenade esc - pause
